steps.t: Reeve Fríthild is in the Mead Hall of Stoke. You should bring Dudsig's recommendation to Reeve Fríthild's attention.
Reeve Fríthild's encampment lies to the west of Stoke. Reeve Fríthild instructed you to meet her party at her encampment.
Reeve Fríthild's encampment lies to the west of Stoke. Reeve Fríthild instructed you to meet her party at her encampment.
Reeve Fríthild is at her encampment, west of Stoke. You should speak with Reeve Fríthild regarding the recent battle.
Reeve Fríthild is in the Mead Hall of Stoke, east of her encampment. Reeve Fríthild has asked you to speak with her in Stoke.
